source: JPL Horizons observer apparent quantities; NAOJ phenomena list used only as coverage hints
generated_from: enumerate Mercury/Venus events from NAOJ 2009-2027 hint times, choose nearest astro candidate from next(when-24h) vs last(when+24h), then verify with JPL Horizons in a local window
